activities.instructions: Choose the modal perfect that best matches the context.
activities.prompt: You sent the form without signing it. You ___ checked it first.
activities.explanation: Comprobarlo era recomendable, pero no se hizo: «should have checked».

activities.instructions: Choose the modal perfect that best matches the context.
activities.prompt: I bought bread, but there were already three loaves at home. I ___ bought any.
activities.explanation: La compra se realizó, pero era innecesaria: «needn't have bought».

activities.instructions: Choose the modal perfect that best matches the context.
activities.prompt: There was a direct train, but we didn't know. We ___ avoided the long bus journey.
activities.explanation: Existía una alternativa no aprovechada: «could have avoided».
